title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
